calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Asset [Probate Code Sec 850 (A)(3))
Off Calendar Feb-06-2012 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Asset [Probate Code Sec 850 (A)(3))
Off Calendar Dec-14-2011 Continued To Feb-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Sprague for Walter Guibeau. Rai Sue Sussman for Kim Burke (Third Party Objector to the amendments). Lisa Nicol for Tim Weeg and Jeniffer Weeg (Interested Parties/Objectors).

Ms. Nicol stated that her Clients object to their note being made part of the Trust and presented oral argument with regard to standing. Ms. Sussman stated that she is not objecting to the issue regarding the Weeg's note, that she does object to some of the specific amendments and that she has a seperate action relating to the Trust (PTR-11-295064). The Petition for Order Confirming Successor Trustee, etc. was continued to February 6, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. However, the issue with regard to confirmation of the Trust asset (Hegstad) was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Kendall.
